title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AI can now generate infrastructure code like Kubernetes manifests and Lambda functions, so junior cloud engineers should prioritize understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance rather than coding alone. The best juniors use AI agents to move faster while critically reviewing outputs against these core principles.
